description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate, Polymorph

You manifest the full primal power of the ancient dire wolf. For 1 minute, your wolf form is elevated beyond its natural limits:

  • Your size becomes Huge (or Large, if not already in wolf form — apply Full Wolf Form effect first).
  • Your land Speed becomes at least 80 feet.
  • You gain a +3 status bonus to all attack rolls and damage rolls.
  • You are immune to the Frightened condition.
  • At the start of each of your turns, all enemies within 30 feet must attempt a Will save (your class DC) or become Frightened 1 (or increase existing Frightened by 1).

When Dire Wolf Aspect ends, you revert to your previous form (Hybrid or human). You cannot use Dire Wolf Aspect again until your next daily preparations.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
description.gm: Dire Wolf Aspect is intentionally the pinnacle of Wolf-Human power. The Huge size should be applied manually on the token. The passive terror aura stacks powerfully with Alpha's Presence and Pack Tactics — a level 20 Wolf-Human is a serious area-denial threat. The daily recharge reflects its extreme power.
